I now have all the information needed.

- **File**: `django/forms/fields.py`
- **Class**: `FileField` (inherits from `Field`)
- **Method**: `clean` (line 573–590) — this is the method that handles `FILE_INPUT_CONTRADICTION`, the "clear" (`False`) case, the "keep initial" case (`not data and initial`), and finally delegates to `super().clean(data)` (which calls `to_python()`) only for a newly submitted file.

{"file":"django/forms/fields.py","class":"FileField","method":"clean","parent_class":"Field","fix_summary":"FileField.clean() draws all three distinctions before delegating to to_python(): it raises a ValidationError when data is FILE_INPUT_CONTRADICTION (widget received contradictory inputs), returns False (or None) when data is False (user clicked 'clear'), returns the existing initial value when no new data was submitted, and only calls super().clean(data) — which invokes to_python() — when an actual new file upload is present."}

parsed_answer.fix_summary: FileField.clean() draws all three distinctions before delegating to to_python(): it raises a ValidationError when data is FILE_INPUT_CONTRADICTION (widget received contradictory inputs), returns False (or None) when data is False (user clicked 'clear'), returns the existing initial value when no new data was submitted, and only calls super().clean(data) — which invokes to_python() — when an actual new file upload is present.
